name: First Phone
overview: Set in early-2000s Kolkata, The First Phone is an Indian Animation Series that follows a tender story of young love, friendship, and the nostalgia of a city on the edge of change.The visuals echo the warmth, innocence, and emotional depth of an era fading into memory. What begins as a simple story of everyday life unfolds into a deeply affecting journey about distance, fate, and the quiet forces that pull people back to one another.The series blends 2d animation with subtle 3D elements and thoughtfully used AI-assisted techniques, all in service of creating a richer, more immersive visual experience.
